title: Draggable Grid Layout
notes: react-grid-layout v2: drag, resize, snap to grid, persist layout to localStorage, add/remove widget panel.

title: System Stats Widget
notes: CPU usage, frequency, temperature, RAM and disk per mount point. Polls /api/system.

title: Docker Widget
notes: Container list with running/stopped status. Start/stop controls via /api/docker.

title: Network Widget
notes: Per-interface Tx/Rx bandwidth (kbps) and IP address. Polls /api/network.

title: Notes Widget
notes: Inline CRUD widget. Title + body, flat JSON store. Persistent via /api/notes.

title: Bookmarks Widget
notes: Name, URL, category. Full CRUD. Tag-based flex layout. /api/bookmarks.

title: iCloud CalDAV Sync
notes: Read/write sync fully working with 5-minute in-process cache. Setup UI added with credential management modal, test-connection endpoint, and clear-credentials flow. All CalDAV call-sites hardened with 15s timeout.

title: Event Write & Edit UI
notes: NewEventModal and EventDetailModal both implemented. Entry points: header '+ Event' button, month cell hover '+', week slot click, day overview '+'. Fixed: calendar_name was silently dropped from the create payload. Added error feedback to create, edit, and delete operations.

title: Calendar Page Stabilization
notes: Ship-ready. All three views (month/week/day) implemented and verified. CalDAV read/write reliable with 5-min cache. Event creation, edit, and delete complete. 24-hour grid with end-of-day event clamping, all-day strip always visible, calendar panel with visibility toggle.

title: Task Management & Projects
notes: Full CRUD with project grouping (colors), priorities (high/medium/low), due dates with overdue highlighting, sort by created/due/priority, completed-task toggle.

title: Calendar Event Linking
notes: Tasks can be linked to iCloud calendar events. Due-date tasks surface on the calendar page as all-day events. Completed tasks show a checkmark badge on the event chip.

title: Roadmap Page
notes: Card grid grouped by section, collapsible with chevron, slide-in detail panel (view/edit/create), dependency chips that navigate between cards, full CRUD backed by /api/roadmap.

title: Research Page
notes: Two-panel layout (list left, editor right). Entry lifecycle: Raw → Breakdown → Post-ready. Fields: title, source URL, status, body, tags, created_at, updated_at. No AI writing assistant — writing happens in Claude.ai.

title: Journal Page
notes: Private daily writing — never published, never leaves GhostGrid. Date list left, full-width editor right. Fields: date, body, created_at.

title: Calendar Agent
notes: Reads/writes calendar via LLM tool calls. Wraps existing /api/calendar endpoints. Example: "What do I have on Friday?" or "Add my exam on Thursday at 2pm."

title: Tasks Agent
notes: Reads/writes tasks and projects via LLM tool calls. Wraps /api/tasks and /api/projects. Example: "What tasks are overdue?" or "Mark the docker cleanup task as done."

title: Research Agent
notes: CRUD on research entries; read by status or tag. Example: "Do I have any notes on the Anthropic emotion paper?" Build after Research page is ship-ready.

title: Journal Agent
notes: Read entries by date, create or append to today's entry. Privacy-sensitive — consider read-only access. Build after Journal page is ship-ready.

title: Mother Agent Orchestrator
notes: Top-level agent at /api/agent/chat. Routes queries to sub-agents, synthesizes cross-domain replies. Example: "What's due this week and do I have research notes on it?" Model: GPT-5 Nano via OpenRouter (~0/month).
